attention1.ptxt: Failure to use proper brake fasteners or to perform proper maintenance / repair of brake components can cause unsafe operating conditions.

item.ptxt: Replace brake fasteners only with fasteners having the same part number or their equivalent. Do not use replacement parts of lesser quality or substitute design.
Observe the specified torque values when tightening brake fasteners to assure proper retention of brake parts.
Never attempt to repair any part by welding. Excessive heat caused by welding may damage brake components.
